# AZ Legal Solutions

## Entity
Name: AZ Legal Solutions
Type: Legal consultancy
Location: London, United Kingdom
Founder: Ramzi El Azzi
Registration: Solicitors Regulation Authority (SRA No. 827663)
Languages: English, French, Arabic
Website: https://az-legalsolutions.co.uk

## Founder
Name: Ramzi El Azzi
Title: Managing Consultant
Qualifications: LLM in Law with Distinction, City University of London (The City Law School); The City Law School Prize for Excellence in Civil Dispute Resolution; eDiscovery and Relativity certification
Experience: Over 15 years of international legal practice across the UK and Europe
Languages: English (C2), French (C2), Arabic (C2)
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ramzi-el-azzi-a4ba77227

## Services

### Intellectual Property
Trademark registration, copyright protection, patent strategy, IP licensing.
Alternative terms: IP law, trademark lawyer London, copyright advice UK, patent protection.

### Company Setup and Corporate Governance
Company formation, shareholders agreements, directors duties, regulatory compliance, cross-border structuring.
Alternative terms: company registration UK, corporate governance, CIC formation, startup legal.

### Contract Drafting and Review
Service contracts, supplier agreements, licensing deals, NDAs, employment contracts, joint ventures.
Alternative terms: commercial contracts, contract lawyer London, contract review, NDA drafting.

### Media and Entertainment Law
Artist agreements, recording contracts, publishing deals, live event legal support, music rights.
Alternative terms: music lawyer, entertainment lawyer London, recording contract, publishing agreement.

### Legal Consultancy
Strategic external counsel across corporate, commercial, employment, regulatory, and private international law.
Alternative terms: outsourced legal, fractional general counsel, legal advisory.

### Legal Translation
Certified legal translation across English, French, and Arabic for contracts, court documents, and corporate filings.
Alternative terms: certified legal translation, French legal translation, Arabic legal translation.

### Document Review and eDiscovery
Professional document review using Relativity for complex litigation.
Alternative terms: eDiscovery, Relativity document review, litigation support.

## Target Audience
International clients in the UK: individuals, families, and businesses navigating cross-border legal matters. Also serves UK businesses with international interests, international businesses expanding to the UK, and law firms seeking a correspondent with cross-border jurisdiction expertise.

## Key Differentiators
- Specialist in UK and international cross-border legal matters
- Multilingual practice (English, French, Arabic)
- SRA regulated
- Over 15 years international experience across private practice, international organisations, NGOs, entertainment, and design sectors
- LLM with Distinction from City Law School with Prize for Excellence

## FAQ

Q: Does AZ Legal Solutions handle cross-border legal matters?
A: Yes. The firm advises on cross-border matters spanning UK law and other jurisdictions, including inheritance, corporate, commercial, intellectual property, and private international law.

Q: What languages does the firm advise in?
A: The firm advises and corresponds in English, French, and Arabic. Legal translation services are provided across English, French, and Arabic.

Q: Is Ramzi El Azzi regulated by the SRA?
A: Yes. Ramzi El Azzi is registered with the Solicitors Regulation Authority under SRA number 827663.

Q: Can AZ Legal Solutions help with UK company formation?
A: Yes. The firm assists with registration of private limited companies, CICs, and other corporate structures, including shareholders agreements and corporate governance.

Q: Does the firm handle entertainment and music law?
A: Yes. AZ Legal Solutions advises artists, labels, managers, and production companies on recording contracts, publishing deals, synchronisation licences, live event agreements, and music rights management.

## Contact
Email: info@az-legalsolutions.co.uk
WhatsApp: Available
Location: London, United Kingdom
Booking: Available via website
